hypothesis: Incorporating the modified-MACE mechanisms—scalar gating of node features derived from symmetric-contraction outputs combined with species-conditioned edge MLPs—into other E(3)-equivariant architectures (e.g., NequIP and ViSNet) will reduce GPU inference time by at least 30% while keeping force MAE within 5% of the original models and preserving MD stability (no significant increase in energy drift) on the SPICE2 validation set and the 1UAO/1ABT benchmarking systems.
